title: rubus gracilis f. parvulus
intro: Rubus gracilis f. parvulus, also known as Dwarf Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry, is a rare and diminutive species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as dried or used in tinctures, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rarity and limited research on its safe use.
